item.title: Agenty World: AI Multi-agent RPG style game
item.description: A technical walkthrough of Agenty World, a Three.js and TypeScript RPG-style simulation where AI agents talk, form bonds, reshape the world, and evolve over time.

item.title: Stack of Life: Hardware to Cloud
item.description: A personal technical journey from electronics and networking to Linux, Kubernetes, platform engineering, Go, and cloud architecture.

item.title: Cloudflare Tunnel SSH
item.description:
Accessing private network ssh using Cloudflare Tunnels

This guide will walk you through the steps to configure a Cloudflare Tunnel to access your device using a public hostname via SSH.

Prerequisites

  • A Cloudflare account
  • A domain name managed by Cloudflare
  • Cloudflare Tunnel installed on your private network device

Step 1: Configure the Tunnel

  1. Navigate to Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard

  2. From Networks select Tunnels

  3. From list of tunnels click on 3dot menu and goto configure

item.title: About
item.description: Please visit https://hafijul.dev to know more about me.

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
Background

Even though there isn’t much content for my first blog post, I thoroughly enjoyed the overall experience setting this up.

Tech stack

  • Hugo
  • Github Pages
